feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: How to Lose Your Virginity (And Accidentally Fall in Love)
entry.summary:
Author: breathbetween

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,595Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 106

Summary: Bruce let out a deep, tired sigh and rubbed at his temple with his glove. “Speak,” he grunted. “You- you mean that-” Clark took a sharp breath, his voice coming out thin, like air slipping from a deflating balloon. “You’re also a virgin?!” Bruce regretted engaging in this conversation instantly. It could have been such a peaceful night.  or whereBatman doesn’t do relationships. Superman is afraid he might hurt someone if he tries. So they come up with a solution. Because what could possibly go wrong with losing your virginity to your best friend? Right?

entry.title: Blinding Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,647Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 12

Summary: When Bruce Wayne's parents are assassinated for his reform proposals, his uncontrolled spirit-magic nearly kills him. Death-servant Clark abandons his sacred duty to save Bruce's life—condemning a spirit to shadow-eternity and losing his own sight in a failed purification ritual. Now forsaken by his people and able to see only magic and mortality, Clark must keep Bruce's wild power from burning him out while wetlands warriors train them both for revolution.Bruce will return to Gotham to destroy the old guard families who murdered his parents. But first, he has to be worth everything Clark sacrificed.

entry.title: Forever and evermore (For Eternity)
entry.summary:
Author: starfishingbythehill

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,019Chapters: 3/7Kudos: 0

Summary: “Come on Clark, it isn’t even that scary!” Clark’s face reminds him of the statue in his mother’s garden, the one over the fountain. The scrunched nose, the distant eyes, the thin lips. Displeasure and acceptance both. He really doesn’t understand what’s wrong. “We climb higher in the barn.” “It isn’t the same thing !” Clark denies. “I can’t do it Bruce, I’m not allowed to. It would make Ma sad.” “You’re such a wuss.” Bruce rolls his eyes and jumps down the tree. Clark pouts, crossing his arms in front of himself. Bruce rolls his eyes harder. Clark never breaks the rules and he never seems happy about it. Anyway, he won’t even stay mad for long, they’re best friends so it’s okay. “Let’s go see the horses. Tommy is teaching me how to ride.” Clark smiles at him then. See? What did he say, it’s okay. They can’t stay mad at each other for long because they can’t stay away from each other for long. They are best friends after all.

entry.title: Keeping Tabs (Or Clark journals about his best friend)
entry.summary:
Author: Not_BootyShakker9000

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,831Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 132

Summary: Clark had used writing to understand himself ever after his powers first appeared, he just didn't expect his little coping mechanism to turn in a new way of looking at his quickly forming crush. ---- Aka. Clark is a weirdo who writes everything he notices about Batman until he actually notices he's in love.

entry.title: Don't Dream it's Over
entry.summary:
Author: NightTwink73

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,904Chapters: 4/20Kudos: 18

Summary: Eight months after Clark and Lois’s divorce, a breakup letter appears on Commissioner Gordon’s desk—addressed to Batman. But everything about it is wrong. Dear Batman,I can’t do this anymore. Whatever this is between us—it isn’t fair to either of us. You’ve always kept me at a distance, and I told myself I was okay with that, but I’m not.I need something real. Something you were never willing to give me.Don’t try to find me. I’m safe, and I won’t be coming back.I love you. Goodbye.— Superman As Bruce investigates, it quickly becomes clear: maybe the letter isn’t lying about Clark not coming back—and that’s a terrifying thought. Meanwhile, Clark wakes up in a dream life, living beside the man he’s never dared to love… trapped in a prison disguised as perfection.

entry.title: Proof of Detection
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,377Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 26

Summary: The worst has already happened - Recognition, Rejection, devastation. Now Bruce and Clark are forced to work together to solve a mystery that could alter the course of the world, while helping to build the Justice League. Can Bruce live with what he's done? Can Clark forgive the ultimate betrayal? Will the League survive the fallout if they can't?

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,486Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 177

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said.“What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around.“It was Death I think?” He replied.“Death? What does that mean?”“Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.”Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building.ORBatman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur.Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day sorta :/

entry.title: Clark's Daily Routine
entry.summary:
Author: Superbat_fan02

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,817Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 44

Summary: Clark was going about his usual routine at the Daily Planet, sitting at his desk with that day’s paper. He was looking over the story he’d been working on about Bruce; he was so focused that he didn’t hear Lois approaching. He didn’t notice her until he heard her voice right next to his ear. “Oh, look at that—it’s your boy toy, Kent.” (This is a fanfic inspired by a piece of fan art I saw on TikTok, so credit for the main idea behind this fanfic goes to @3IIluon)

entry.title: Greener Pastures
entry.summary:
Author: SourFox

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,390Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: In a Gotham ruled by the Court of Owls, Bruce had been stripped of his post, and if his source was correct, soon everything else. Prioritizing his family they left the city. Clark had heard the rumors, few hadn't, of the centaur herd that travelled ever westward. He had expected to find a group of hardened warriors and found children. He offered an unuse parcel of his land for the herd to settle on, but the young centaur looked more ready to chase him away with his Shepard's crook than anything.

entry.title: Two Months In Kansas
entry.summary:
Author: Superbat_fan02

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,832Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Alfred forces Bruce to spend two months on vacation in Kansas, a small, sparsely populated town, to give him a break from his grueling training and the mental exhaustion of spending almost every night at his computer reading thousands of Gotham police reports. On this short trip, Bruce meets Clark, a boy a year younger than him who is his complete opposite. Clark is cheerful, honest, empathetic, and responsible. The golden boy of Kansas, always with a smile and a pleasant tone of voice. But Bruce doesn’t believe that’s the whole story. Clark lives on and grew up on the farm where there are reports of a UFO crash, and, mysteriously, his “parents”—who weren’t parents at the time—are now his parents. Was it really a coincidence that Clark appeared after this supposed UFO news? Furthermore, not to mention that Bruce was already considered tall and well-built for his age, Clark was even taller and bigger than him. He always seemed to hear more than he intended to, or would carelessly lift objects that would be a challenge even for adults to lift. Bruce was sure of it—there was something about Clark, and he wanted to find out what it was.

entry.title: Wings and Fangs: A Ladyhawke AU
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,274Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Bruce Wayne becomes a hawk at sunrise. Kal-El becomes a wolf at sunset. Ninety seconds of overlap twice a day. Three years of this. They can see each other. Can't touch. Can't speak. Just run toward each other and fail, over and over, while their bodies break and the curse grinds them down to nothing. Ra's al Ghul built it to torture them. Punishment for refusing to serve. For loving each other. For being happy. Tim Drake finds them six months after everyone else gave up looking. He's wounded, obsessed, and the entire hero community thinks he's lost it. He doesn't care. With a guilt-ridden mage, a solar eclipse, and sheer bloody-minded determination, Tim is going to break an unbreakable curse. Even if it kills him. A Ladyhawke AU. Body horror. Transformation curses. Two legends reduced to beasts. And one Robin who refuses to let them suffer alone.

entry.title: The Dark Forest
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,857Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 45

Summary: "Hey! Sorry to intrude on this..." Shayera made vague gestures to encompass the conference room. Kal had a feeling she was restraining herself from calling it a playdate, "—whatever this is, but we've run into a problem."   "What kind of problem?" Diana prompted as she stood from Bruce's chair's armrest.   "Our little detainee—Roy Dickchawski—" Shayera sneered, wrinkling her nose in disgust and rage, as if recalling an unpleasant, recent memory. "He barely cracked, gave us almost nothing to work with. But more importantly, isn't a US citizen."   "What?" Kal turned to Bruce—stoic, unfazed Bruce.   "Why didn't you say?!" He seethed out, glaring at Bruce as the man stood from the monitors.   "What would that have achieved?"   "I would know!"   "You don't trust me?"   "I—don't put words in my mouth, Bruce. You know I trust you."

entry.title: Reroll Guide: Kryptonian Build Unlock Via Aggressive Matchmaking
entry.summary:
Author: RevasLavellan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,558Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: She has died in Gotham enough times to write a book on “101 creative ways to die” and develop an opinion on game balance—whoever designed this hell-broken death-trap disguised as a city deserves jail. Preferably in Arkham. Preferably right between Joker and Riddler. So when she finally rolled a miracle jackpot account—Bruce Wayne’s daughter—she does the only sensible thing every true hard-core gamer would do: panic and drop an irresponsible amount of money on a premium trait for better survivability…only to be hit with the worst unlock prerequisite she has ever seen—namely getting the World’s Finest to fall in love on schedule. Now she has a rare build, a ticking origin-story deadline, and two stubborn not-yet-legendary future parents who are somehow both intelligent yet completely, impossibly useless at following obvious romantic instructions. …It really would be easier if Batman was being less Batman about it. Well, Claire will just have to show them how extreme a Player can get to preserve her hard-won Kryptonian build. If she has to take matters into her own hands and personally drag this timeline to the altar by its ankles, then so be it. Trust me, the universe will cooperate.

entry.title: How to be liked by your partner’s parent by Clark Kent
entry.summary:
Author: YoursOdi

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,723Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 87

Summary: Clark Kent is absolutely in love with Bruce Wayne and no one could ever possibly stop that love… well maybe except for his father, Thomas Wayne but Clark tries to leave a good first impression when they meet. It shouldn’t be that difficult though because Thomas only really dislikes Superman and no way in hell would Clark Kent be Super- Wait, why are you looking like that Clark? ——————A small little fic about how Thomas Wayne would react to his son being in a relationship with the Man of Steel. It got some elements from Flashpoint but you don’t have to know the lore to understand this fic (I still very recommend to watch/read it).

Summary: Hi! I’m 咩咩鱼鱼 This is a collection of some of my SuperBat NSFW artworks.Please read the tags carefully before viewing to make sure you’re comfortable with the content. I’m a big fan of trans Bruce / cuntboy Bruce, so in my works Bruce has a vagina and Clark is well endowed.If that’s not your thing, please feel free to skip.   之前画的一些超蝙色色合集，基本都是cuntboy蝙注意避雷，以及我喜欢画阿黑颜高潮脸

entry.title: Flay, Maim, Kill (Especially Clark)
entry.summary:
Author: QianMeihua

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,030Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 654

Summary: The Justice League has too much time on their hands, Bruce internally criticizes. That's the only explanation why they're playing "Fuck, Marry, Kill" for the entire cafeteria to see, right? There's no other reason why he'd be on the list, right? OR Clark is not-so-subtly dropping hints, hoping that The World's Greatest Detective will throw the Kryptonian a bone.

entry.title: Are You Brave Enough to See?
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,863Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 76

Summary: Bruce has a hard time letting himself accept his role under Kal's thumb. If he only lowered his inhibitions a bit, he'd see that mindless pleasure is exactly what he needs. With a little help from one of Ivy's new pollens, Kal intends to help him see the light. *Can be read standalone*
